zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme於1080年出生在法國崔英德 艾特 洛易普易利-素-可萊時，他的父親Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme35歲，母親Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers38歲。他於大約1090年與Aveline在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1103年被列為comte de vendôme (1103-1145)。他去世於1145年在法國藍多-盧希隆加爾沙吉吉勒斯享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme was born in 1080, in Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, France, his father, Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme, was 35 and his mother, Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers, was 38. He married Aveline about 1090, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1103, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as comte de vendôme (1103-1145). He died in 1145, in Saint-Gilles, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme est né en 1080, à Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, France, son père, Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Aveline environ 1090, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1103, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est comte de vendôme (1103-1145). Il est décédé en 1145, à Saint-Gilles, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Cen: Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme 1080 in Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme 35 und seine Mutter Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers 38. Er hat um 1090 in Frankreich Aveline geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1103, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als comte de vendôme (1103-1145) aufgeführt. Er starb 1145 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Saint-Gilles, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Aveline circa 1090, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1103, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come comte de vendôme (1103-1145). Morì nel 1145, nel Saint-Gilles, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendômeが1080年にフランスセントアインダー エト ロイアープレウイリ-スル-クレイゼで生まれた時，父Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendômeは35歳，母Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Neversは38歳であった。約1090年にフランスでAvelineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1103年，23歳の時，職業はcomte de vendôme (1103-1145)と記録されている。彼は1145年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンガードサイント-ジレスで65歳で死去した。

ko.Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Cen: 프랑스 세트르 인드르 트 로이르 프레우이리-수-c레이스
ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme(이)가 1080년 프랑스 세트르 인드르 트 로이르 프레우이리-수-c레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1090년 프랑스에서 Aveline(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1103년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 comte de vendôme (1103-1145)이었다. 그는 1145년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 가드 세인트-길레스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme nasceu em 1080, em Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, França, seu pai, Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Aveline aproximadamente 1090, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1103, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como comte de vendôme (1103-1145). Ele faleceu em 1145, em Saint-Gilles, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, com 65 anos.

ro.Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Cen: Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, Franţa

ru.Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre-et-Loire, Cen: преуилли-сур-клеис, индр эт лоир, кентр, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme родился в 1080 г. в местности преуилли-сур-клеис, индр эт лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Aveline около 1090 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1103 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии comte de vendôme (1103-1145). Он умер в 1145 г. в местности сеинт-гиллесь, гард, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy de PREUILLY IV dit Grisegonnelle, Count of Vendôme nació en 1080, en Preuilly-sur-Claise, Indre et Loire, Centre, Francia, su papá, Geoffroi III Jourdain de Preuilly Comte de Vendôme, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Euphrosine de Vendôme, comtesse de Vendôme et de Nevers, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Aveline aproximadamente 1090, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1103, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era comte de vendôme (1103-1145). Murió en 1145, en Saint-Gilles, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
